title: Coffee and Cigarettes
synopsis:
"Let's pretend this coffee is champagne... to celebrate life."
This unique feature collects eleven unconnected comic vignettes. An eclectic cast of actors and musicians sit around café tables, smoking, drinking coffee, and engaging in quirky conversations. They discuss subjects ranging from the inventions of Nikola Tesla to Elvis conspiracy theories, finding bizarre humour in awkward arguments and friendly chatter. Filmed intermittently over 17 years, Jarmusch strips narrative down to its absolute essence to capture the undramatic, transitional breaks in people's days.

synopsis_lang.en:
"Let's pretend this coffee is champagne... to celebrate life."
This unique feature collects eleven unconnected comic vignettes. An eclectic cast of actors and musicians sit around café tables, smoking, drinking coffee, and engaging in quirky conversations. They discuss subjects ranging from the inventions of Nikola Tesla to Elvis conspiracy theories, finding bizarre humour in awkward arguments and friendly chatter. Filmed intermittently over 17 years, Jarmusch strips narrative down to its absolute essence to capture the undramatic, transitional breaks in people's days.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
「我們把這杯咖啡當成香檳吧……為了慶祝生命。」
由十一段互不相連的短篇結集而成，全都發生在咖啡桌上。陣容鼎盛且個性各異的演員與音樂人圍桌而坐，一邊抽煙喝咖啡，一邊漫無邊際閒聊着離奇古怪的話題。從特斯拉的發明到貓王陰謀論，在尷尬的爭辯與友好的交談之中，碰撞出荒誕的趣味。斷斷續續拍攝了十七年，占渣木殊將敘事化繁為簡，歸納出最純粹的本質，只為捕捉日常生活中那些看似毫無戲劇張力的過渡時刻。

cast: Roberto Benigni, Bill Murray, Cate Blanchett

cast_lang.en: Roberto Benigni, Bill Murray, Cate Blanchett
cast_lang.zh_hk: Roberto Benigni, Bill Murray, Cate Blanchett
